response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Highly compatible; lyrics and phonetics match the Reference JSON closely for all three songs in the medley. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the Reference JSON to structure the transcription, applying manual corrections to spelling, layout, and segment timings to ensure accurate, context-aware translations. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to match the vocal track, using aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep up with the fast-paced, continuous song delivery without creating cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 見たい見たい見たい見たい...
subtitles.english: I want to see, I want to see, I want to see...

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ キミがひとり悔しがってるの 知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're regretting all alone, I know it.

subtitles.original: ズキュンズキュンと高まるじゃん キミを推すことはやめない
subtitles.english: My heart is throbbing wildly, right? I won't stop supporting you.

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ キミはできること 知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you can do it, I know it.

subtitles.original: 辛いときは弱いぐらいでちょうどいい あたしそれでも好きだよ
subtitles.english: When times are tough, it's okay to be a little weak. I still love you anyway.

subtitles.original: MWAH! お願いキミが欲しいの 名前を呼んでよ
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you. Call my name.

subtitles.original: いつだって愛に参上 キミはひとりだ
subtitles.english: I'll always show up for love. You are all alone.

subtitles.original: だから歌う ひとりじゃない もういいでしょう
subtitles.english: So I sing, you're not alone, isn't that enough?

subtitles.original: ソロプレイはおしまいなんだ たったったってば
subtitles.english: Solo play is over now, I'm telling you.

subtitles.original: キミが病めるときも あたしそばにいるわ
subtitles.english: Even when you are sick, I will be by your side.

subtitles.original: いつも見守っているわ
subtitles.english: I am always watching over you.

subtitles.original: そうよ 怖くないのよ
subtitles.english: Yes, it is not scary at all.

subtitles.original: MWAH! お願いキミが欲しいの 慰めさせて
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you. Let me comfort you.

subtitles.original: シェイク シェイク 愛の才能で 泣いてくれなきゃ
subtitles.english: Shake shake, with the talent of love, if you don't cry...

subtitles.original: 枯れてしまう 触れていたい ねえいいでしょう
subtitles.english: ...I'll wither away. I want to touch you, hey, isn't that okay?

subtitles.original: 涙拭き取って 飲み干したいんだ たったったってば
subtitles.english: I want to wipe away your tears and drink them up, I'm telling you.

subtitles.original: MWAH! お願いキミが欲しいの 頼り散らして
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you. Rely on me completely.

subtitles.original: シェイプアップなんて最高ね
subtitles.english: Shaping up is the absolute best, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 分けてくれなきゃ キミの痛い 感じてたい
subtitles.english: If you don't share it with me, I want to feel your pain...

subtitles.original: 吸い取って 救いたいんだ たったったってば
subtitles.english: ...I want to suck it up and save you, I'm telling you.

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ キミがひとり涙知ってるの 知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're crying all alone, I know it.

subtitles.original: グズグズへこんでさ 弱音吐いたらインザナイト
subtitles.english: Feeling down and whimpering, if you let out your complaints in the night...

subtitles.original: 朝が来るまで一足二足 もっと泣いたって Mommy
subtitles.english: Step by step until morning comes, even if you cry more...

subtitles.original: 何度だって受け止めてあげる もう我慢しないで出して たったったってば
subtitles.english: ...I'll accept you over and over. Don't hold back anymore, let it out, I'm telling you.

subtitles.original: 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕
subtitles.english: Da da da da da da da da da...

subtitles.original: ながらの優等生 今宵も自分と密会です しんどいわ しんどいわ あー つらつら合掌
subtitles.english: I'm an honor student, secretly meeting myself tonight. It's exhausting, it's exhausting, ah, offering a prayer.

subtitles.original: ほんとは劣等生 あたしはあたしに説教です しんどいわ しんどいわ もーいやいや絶交
subtitles.english: Actually, I'm a failure, preaching to myself. It's exhausting, it's exhausting, I give up, I'm breaking up with myself.

subtitles.original: 心配無用 心配無用 これは笑えるジョークソング
subtitles.english: Don't worry, don't worry, this is just a funny joke song.

subtitles.original: 新米も老害も みんな歌えるポップソング
subtitles.english: Newcomers and veterans alike can sing this pop song.

subtitles.original: まあまあ それ噂っすよ ただの紙切れっすよ
subtitles.english: Well, that's just a rumor, just a worthless piece of paper.

subtitles.original: いいから はやく ハンコ押せや
subtitles.english: Just hurry up and sign the contract.

subtitles.original: デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん 悪魔ほどそう言うもん
subtitles.english: I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil, that's just what devils say.

subtitles.original: あー 死んじゃった 死んじゃった 愛してほしいじゃん
subtitles.english: Ah, I died, I died, I want you to love me.

subtitles.original: それでもハマっちゃうなら それでも恋しちゃうなら
subtitles.english: Even so, if you fall for it, even so, if you fall in love.

subtitles.original: あー 死んじゃった 死んじゃった エンジェルエンジェル
subtitles.english: Ah, I died, I died, Angel, Angel.

subtitles.original: わー！悲報 悲報 悲報 悲報
subtitles.english: Woah! Tragic news, tragic news, tragic news, tragic news.

subtitles.original: わー！汚いね
subtitles.english: Woah! It's dirty.

subtitles.original: わー！飛べないね
subtitles.english: Woah! It can't fly.

subtitles.original: デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん
subtitles.english: I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil.

subtitles.original: あー 死んじゃった 死んじゃった
subtitles.english: Ah, I died, I died.

subtitles.original: 本当の天使 スルーしてご臨終
subtitles.english: Ignoring the real angel, it's the end.

subtitles.original: あくまで天使じゃん？ 最強じゃん
subtitles.english: After all, an angel, right? Isn't it the strongest?

subtitles.original: 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕 堕
subtitles.english: Da da da da da da da da da...

subtitles.original: いいよ黙って銘々の悪意
subtitles.english: Fine, just shut up, the malice of each of us...

subtitles.original: 夢叶うって奪ったサラリー
subtitles.english: ...stealing our salaries under the guise of "making dreams come true."

subtitles.original: あー中毒性の高いもんには 裏があるんだな ああ
subtitles.english: Ah, highly addictive things always have a catch, ah.

subtitles.original: 魂の枯れちゃって 嫌ね 嫌ね
subtitles.english: Withered soul, how unpleasant, how unpleasant.

subtitles.original: 光り輝く輪っかで この首が締まってく
subtitles.english: With this shining halo, my neck is being strangled.

subtitles.original: 嘘をつきは緩んでく 言えないS.O.S
subtitles.english: If I tell lies, it loosens. I can't say S.O.S.

subtitles.original: 白いペンキを塗りましょう なりきってしまいましょう
subtitles.english: Let's paint it white. Let's pretend completely.

subtitles.original: 嘘をつけば楽になる ほらやっちゃって
subtitles.english: If you lie, it gets easier. Look, go ahead and do it.

subtitles.original: デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん
subtitles.english: I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil.

subtitles.original: あー 死んじゃった 死んじゃった あー
subtitles.english: Ah, I died, I died, ah.

subtitles.original: それでも穿っちゃうけど それでも嫌っちゃうけど
subtitles.english: Even so, we doubt it, even so, we hate it.

subtitles.original: なりきって笑顔で エンジェルエンジェル
subtitles.english: Pretend with a smile, Angel, Angel.

subtitles.original: デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん 悪魔ほどそう言うもん

subtitles.original: 本当の悪魔になってもプレイヤーズ
subtitles.english: Even if I become a real devil, players...

subtitles.original: あくまで天使じゃん？ 最強じゃん
subtitles.english: After all, an angel, right? Isn't it the strongest?

subtitles.original: 充電器を貸して！ またあなたのせいで あたしすり減った
subtitles.english: Lend me your charger! Once again, you've worn me out.

subtitles.original: 終電見逃して またあたしのせいで 帰れなくなった
subtitles.english: Missed the last train, again because of me, you couldn't go home.
